verses.1: The word that came to Jeremiah from the LORD, saying,
verses.2: “The LORD, the God of Israel, says, ‘Write all the words that I have spoken to you in a book.
verses.3: For, behold, the days come,’ says the LORD, ‘that I will reverse the captivity of my people Israel and Judah,’ says the LORD. ‘I will cause them to return to the land that I gave to their fathers, and they will possess it.’”
verses.4: These are the words that the LORD spoke concerning Israel and concerning Judah.
verses.6: Ask now, and see whether a man travails with child.
verses.7: Alas, for that day is great, so that none is like it!
verses.8: It will come to pass in that day, says the LORD of Armies, that I will break his yoke from off your neck,
verses.9: but they will serve the LORD their God,
verses.10: Therefore don’t be afraid, O Jacob my servant, says the LORD.
verses.11: For I am with you, says the LORD, to save you;
verses.13: There is no one to plead your cause,
verses.14: All your lovers have forgotten you.
verses.15: Why do you cry over your injury?
verses.16: Therefore all those who devour you will be devoured.
verses.17: For I will restore health to you,
verses.19: Thanksgiving will proceed out of them
verses.20: Their children also will be as before,
verses.21: Their prince will be one of them,
verses.23: Behold, the LORD’s storm, his wrath, has gone out,
verses.24: The fierce anger of the LORD will not return until he has accomplished,
